raw_consumer_statement: I have a Citi card through XXXX. I was charged for purchases I didn't make. Mostly XXXX charges. I contacted Citi to dispute these charges, but they were not removed from my account. I have attached the photos showing some of the disputed charges below, along with my XXXX account purchase history. I have been a Citi customer for years. I racked up close to XXXX in charges in the last year alone ( and paid them on time ), and, for the first time, reported fraudulent charges. I find it crazy that they havent been removed and credited back to me. I told them that I would file a report with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. I received my new card after I called to report these fraudulent charges, but the investigation was conducted, and the fraudulent charges were assigned to me ( labeled as my responsibility ). As you can see from the photos, XXXX of the charges was generously reversed ( for XXXX ), but none of the others were. I don't understand the process they used or why they would refuse to refund me for charges I didn't make, as this clearly violates the Fair Credit Billing Act. Any help here would be greatly appreciated.
